chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-3193 of 2020 a/w C.P.No.D-3399 of 2020 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 22.01.2025 Mr.Ahmed Ali Hussain and Mr.Aizaz Ahmed, Advocates for the Petitioners. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Ms.Masooda Siraj, Advocate for Respondent (F.B.R) Mr.Bashir Ahmed, Advocate for Respondent No.15. Ms.Nasima Mangrio, Advocate for KPT Mr.Syed Samiullah Shah, Advocate for Respondent No.17 (in C.P.No.D- 3193/2020) It is jointly stated that the subject matter of these petitions is squarely covered by a judgment of Division Bench of this Court reported as 2020 P.T.D. 1952 (Qasim International Container Terminal Pakistan Ltd. & others v. Federation of Pakistan & others), therefore, these petitions may be disposed of in reliance upon the reasoning and rationale so illumined. Order accordingly. Office is directed to place copy of this order in connected petition. Judge Judge nasir`
